title: rottboellia cancellata
intro: Rottboellia cancellata, also known as Kalmegh or Bhumyamalaki, is a plant species native to tropical regions of Asia and Africa, belonging to the grass family Poaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Rottboellia cancellata include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and support the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and roots are typically used to make decoctions, infusions, and powders, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
